description: Lucy Livings started her role as Regional Director for South-West in January 2024. Prior to this Lucy was Deputy Director within the south-west region from 2019. Lucy is an experienced civil servant with a broad range of experience including: posts within the Department for International Development in Afghanistan, Zimbabwe, and in the conflict and nutrition policy teams a 3-year secondment to the USA as Senior Advisor to the UK Executive Director of the World Bank several years in Private Office working for three different Permanent Secretaries

details.body:
Lucy Livings started her role as Regional Director for South-West in January 2024.

Prior to this Lucy was Deputy Director within the south-west region from 2019. Lucy is an experienced civil servant with a broad range of experience including:

  • posts within the Department for International Development in Afghanistan, Zimbabwe, and in the conflict and nutrition policy teams
  • a 3-year secondment to the USA as Senior Advisor to the UK Executive Director of the World Bank
  • several years in Private Office working for three different Permanent Secretaries

Lucy Livings started her role as Regional Director for South-West in January 2024.

Prior to this Lucy was Deputy Director within the south-west region from 2019. Lucy is an experienced civil servant with a broad range of experience including:

  • posts within the Department for International Development in Afghanistan, Zimbabwe, and in the conflict and nutrition policy teams
  • a 3-year secondment to the USA as Senior Advisor to the UK Executive Director of the World Bank
  • several years in Private Office working for three different Permanent Secretaries

The Regional Director for South West is responsible for working locally across children’s social care, SEND, schools and area-based programmes to improve outcomes for children, families and learners. They are responsible for making decisions in the following local authorities:

  • Bath and North East Somerset
  • Bournemouth, Christchurch and Poole
  • Bristol, City of
  • Cornwall
  • Devon
  • Dorset
  • Gloucestershire
  • Isles Of Scilly
  • North Somerset
  • Plymouth
  • Somerset
  • South Gloucestershire
  • Swindon
  • Torbay
  • Wiltshire

More information about the regional directors is available.

Read about the South-West England advisory board.

If you have any questions email the regional director’s office RG.SW@education.gov.uk.

role_appointments.title: Lucy Livings - Regional Director for South West
